data.evacuation_orders: Echols County: Residents living on or near Will Rewis and Chauncey Rd.

child_geo_events.address: 4407 Rocky Ford Rd, Valdosta, GA 31601, USA
child_geo_events.name: Camp Rock

data.information: Camp Rock is also a evacuation site, per Echols Co EMA on Facebook. Per a post reshared by Echols Co EMA on Facebook: "Camp Rock has generously stepped in to provide 200+ meals for  Thursday night! They also have beds to sleep 65 people if you were evacuated and need a place to go. Showers, washers, and dryers for laundry."

The American Red Cross, in coordination with local officials, has opened an emergency shelter for residents affected by the wildfire, per Echols Co EMA on Facebook.

Location:

Venture of Faith Camp
1309 GA Highway 135 S
Lake Park, GA 31636

Who Should Go:

  • Residents who have been evacuated or feel unsafe remaining in their homes.

What to Bring (if possible):

  • Medications

  • Important documents

  • Clothing and personal items

  • Bedding/pillows

  • Items for children (formula, diapers, comfort items)

Pets:

  • Pets are welcomed but they will be housed separately.

child_geo_events.name: Shiloh Baptist Church

data.information: An evacuation center is at Shiloh Baptist Church, located at 1055 CR 226, Green Cove Springs, FL 32043, per Clay County Fire Rescue on Facebook.

Rodeheaver Boys Ranch is offering a safe place for horses in their paddocks.

  • Must have updated Coggins

  • Must be an emergency need

For more information contact Barn Manager Crystal at 386-336-3435.

Information provided by the Putnam County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.
The Bostwick Community Center, 125 Tillman St., is open per the Putnam County Sheriff's Office Facebook page.
